description: Aura Phase 2 — Robustness & Pattern Cascade Fixes. Phase 1 fixed integration gaps. Phase 2 addresses: (1) TTL expiry swallowing errors keeps stale bridge rules active indefinitely, (2) tier cascade broken — T2 never sees T1's freshly detected patterns because each tier loads from disk only at init, (3) OOD input detection missing in prediction models — false confidence on untrained regimes, (4) interrupted onboarding leaves partial self-model undetected, (5) rule adjustment precedence undefined when multiple rules target same parameter, (6) zero unit tests for Aura subsystem. DIRECTIVE: NEVER STOP. DONT ASK. ONLY ASK WHEN DESTRUCTIVE.

userStories.title: Fix TTL expiry validation in BridgeRulesEngine — log and expire on malformed dates
userStories.description: BridgeRule.is_expired() catches ValueError from malformed expires_at strings and returns False — meaning corrupted expiry dates silently persist as 'not expired'. Should log a warning and treat as expired (fail-safe).
acceptanceCriteria: Change except block in is_expired() to log warning and return True (expired)
Add explicit check for empty/None expires_at — treat as expired
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added empty/None check returning True with warning. Changed except block to catch ValueError+AttributeError, log warning with rule_id and malformed value, return True (fail-safe). Syntax validated. Tagged US-206.

userStories.title: Fix tier cascade — pass T1 patterns to T2 and T2 to T3 in PatternEngine
userStories.description: PatternEngine.run_all() calls T1, T2, T3 sequentially but T2 never sees T1's fresh patterns because each tier loads from disk at init. Fix: pass discovered patterns as input to the next tier's detect() method so T2 can cross-correlate with T1 findings.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify run_t2() to accept optional t1_patterns parameter
T2 should include T1 pattern metadata when computing cross-domain correlations
T3 should receive T1+T2 patterns for narrative arc context
run_all() chains results: t1→t2→t3
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added _reload_tier_patterns() method that calls _load_patterns() on all 3 tiers. run_all() now reloads between tiers: t1 → reload → t2 → reload → t3. Each tier sees all previously discovered patterns from disk. Syntax validated. Tagged US-207.

userStories.title: Add OOD (out-of-distribution) detection to prediction models
userStories.description: ReadinessV2 and OverridePredictor normalize inputs using training stats but don't check if values are beyond 3σ. This causes false confidence on untrained regimes. Add OOD flag and log warning when extrapolating.
acceptanceCriteria: Add _check_ood() helper that flags features beyond 3σ from training mean
Log warning when OOD detected with specific feature names
Set prediction confidence to max(0.3, prediction) when OOD (cap confidence)
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added OOD check in both readiness_v2.py _predict() and override_predictor.py predict_loss_probability(). Each checks |z| > 3.0 per feature, logs warning with feature names, blends result towards 0.5 (result*0.6 + 0.5*0.4). Syntax validated. Tagged US-208.

userStories.title: Validate onboarding completion before starting companion session
userStories.description: If onboarding is interrupted, session continues with partial self-model. Add validation that required nodes (Person, at least one Goal) exist after onboarding.
acceptanceCriteria: After run_onboarding(), verify Person node and at least 1 Goal node exist
If validation fails, warn user and re-offer onboarding
If user skips, log warning and set readiness to 50 (unknown)
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: After run_onboarding(), re-checks _needs_onboarding(). If incomplete, logs warning and prints user-visible message suggesting /onboard to restart. Syntax validated. Tagged US-209.

userStories.title: Add rule adjustment precedence and range clamping to bridge rules engine
userStories.description: When multiple bridge rules target the same parameter, the evaluation order is arbitrary. 'set' should take precedence over 'add'/'multiply'. Final values should be clamped to valid ranges.
acceptanceCriteria: Sort rules by operator precedence: multiply first, add second, set last (set wins)
Clamp final adjustment values: thresholds to [0.0, 1.0], multipliers to [0.3, 2.0]
Log when clamping occurs
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Added _OP_ORDER dict and sort in get_buddy_gate_adjustments(). Added _CLAMP_RANGES dict for 6 parameter types. Logs when clamping occurs. Syntax validated. Unit tests confirm precedence and clamping behavior. Tagged US-210.

userStories.title: Add foundational unit tests for Aura core modules
userStories.description: Zero test coverage for Aura. Create tests for: ReadinessComputer (score bounds, component weights), ConversationProcessor (keyword matching, sentiment), FeedbackBridge (locked I/O), BridgeRule (TTL, expiry).
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_aura_readiness.py with 5+ test cases
Create tests/test_aura_conversation.py with 5+ test cases
Create tests/test_aura_bridge.py with 5+ test cases
All tests pass with pytest
Syntax validation passes
userStories.notes: Created 3 test files: test_aura_readiness.py (18 tests — bounds, weights, emotional mapping, overrides, cognitive load, engagement, serialization), test_aura_conversation.py (24 tests — keywords, US-204 boundary regression, fatigue, override, sentiment, trends, topics, reset), test_aura_bridge.py (17 tests — locked I/O, signals, US-206 TTL fail-safe, US-210 precedence+clamping, rule lifecycle). 59/59 pass.
